description_long: This office building complex consists of three interconnected structures, each with a distinct facade and geometric window patterns. The leftmost section features blue and white diagonal and rectangular motifs, with a rooftop area that appears to have skylights or solar panels. The central section is characterized by a grid of green and white triangular and rectangular shapes, giving it a modern, decorative appearance. The rightmost section displays a regular grid of square windows with yellow accents, and a flat roof. The overall structure is mid-rise, with approximately seven visible floors, and the facades are dominated by glass and concrete materials. The building exudes a contemporary, International Style aesthetic, with clean lines and a focus on geometric repetition.
description: A modern office building complex with three connected sections, each featuring distinct geometric window patterns and a mix of blue, green, and yellow accents. The facades are primarily glass and concrete, reflecting a contemporary architectural style.
description_view_0: The leftmost section is prominent, showing blue and white diagonal patterns and a rooftop with skylights or solar panels.
description_view_1: The front view reveals all three sections: blue and white on the left, green and white geometric patterns in the center, and a yellow-accented grid on the right.
description_view_2: The rightmost section is most visible, highlighting the yellow grid window pattern and the flat roof.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back facades of all three sections, with the blue and white section now on the right and the green and yellow sections to the left.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced rectangular and square windows arranged in vertical and horizontal grids, with some sections featuring geometric decorative panels.
